cross_eval_summary.primary_failure_pattern: Protocol adherence creates mechanical output that judges rate lower than natural baseline responses
critical_issues: Step 0 info-gathering leaks premature analysis markers (Eval 152)
Pause markers reduce perceived output quality despite correct implementation (Eval 153)
Token usage 59% higher with no quality improvement to justify cost
Output format too rigid compared to baseline's engaging structure

repair_recommendations.action: Rewrite Step 0 instructions to explicitly forbid mentioning layer names (Why/How/What) during info-gathering phase. Only ask questions without revealing analysis structure.
repair_recommendations.expected_impact: Fix Eval 152 failure pattern, prevent protocol self-contradiction

repair_recommendations.issue: Pause markers create mechanical feel that reduces output quality perception
repair_recommendations.action: Redesign pause block to be less intrusive. Consider softer language or integrate confirmation request more naturally into output flow.
repair_recommendations.expected_impact: Improve pairwise comparison scores while maintaining interaction protocol

repair_recommendations.issue: Output quality lags baseline despite correct protocol adherence
repair_recommendations.action: Add examples showing engaging output patterns (Slogans, case references, visual formatting) within the protocol constraints. Improve content depth to justify token overhead.
repair_recommendations.expected_impact: Close quality gap with baseline, improve win rate in pairwise comparisons

repair_recommendations.issue: Token efficiency - 59% overhead with no quality benefit
repair_recommendations.action: Add token budget guidance to skill spec. Require concise output in direct-result mode. Optimize pause marker verbosity.
repair_recommendations.expected_impact: Reduce cost_adjusted_value from -0.6299 toward neutral or positive
